caption: A group of men and women walk through an outdoor paved area bordered by trees and buildings. A man in a white shirt and black vest leads the group, accompanied by other men in white traditional Indian clothing and suits. On-screen graphics feature images of politicians and a red news ticker. The text "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" appears at the top of the frames. In the first frame, the ticker reads "जे. पी. नड्डा: I.N.D.I. गठबंधन चलने वाला नहीं है". The ticker in the final frame changes to "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है". The side panels list names such as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," "संतोष सुमन," and "सुमित कुमार" under the heading "मंत्री". A "MANKIYI" logo and the time "10:07 PM" are visible at the bottom right. The group continues walking forward across the frames, with subtle changes in their positions.
